verdict.summary: The change correctly moves the arm-time hold, reviewed-head, draft/state/author, same-repository head, base-ref, and live security-label checks onto a second PR snapshot taken after the potentially slow immutable changed-file inspection. Head changes are returned to review:needs; other invariant failures stop the operation; holds preserve the human-owned state; and the actual arm remains SHA-bound by expectedHeadOid. Trust-surface and label-derived audit behavior is preserved. The added self-tests are non-vacuous: they inject races only after the entry read and assert that no ready/latch/pass mutation occurs, while also covering the newly enforced live invariants. The remaining post-probe label/base TOCTOU is explicitly documented and not widened by this patch.
